roles.name: Grandmother
roles.description: You start knowing a good player & their character. If the Demon kills them, you die too.

roles.name: Sailor
roles.description: Each night, choose an alive player: either you or they are drunk until dusk. You can't die.

roles.name: Chambermaid
roles.description: Each night, choose 2 alive players (not yourself): you learn how many woke tonight due to their ability.

roles.name: Exorcist
roles.description: Each night*, choose a player (different to last night): the Demon, if chosen, learns who you are then doesn't wake tonight.

roles.name: Innkeeper
roles.description: Each night*, choose 2 players: they can't die tonight, but 1 is drunk until dusk.

roles.name: Gambler
roles.description: Each night*, choose a player & guess their character: if you guess wrong, you die.

roles.name: Gossip
roles.description: Each day, you may make a public statement. Tonight, if it was true, a player dies.

roles.name: Courtier
roles.description: Once per game, at night, choose a character: they are drunk for 3 nights & 3 days.

roles.name: Professor
roles.description: Once per game, at night*, choose a dead player: if they are a Townsfolk, they are resurrected.

roles.name: Minstrel
roles.description: When a Minion dies by execution, all other players (except Travellers) are drunk until dusk tomorrow.

roles.name: Tea Lady
roles.description: If both your alive neighbors are good, they can't die.

roles.name: Pacifist
roles.description: Executed good players might not die.

roles.name: Fool
roles.description: The 1st time you die, you don't.

roles.name: Goon
roles.description: Each night, the 1st player to choose you with their ability is drunk until dusk. You become their alignment.

roles.name: Lunatic
roles.description: you think you are a Demon, but you are not. The Demon knows who you are & who you choose at night.

roles.name: Tinker
roles.description: You might die at any time.

roles.name: Moonchild
roles.description: When you learn that you died, publicly choose 1 alive player. Tonight, if it was a good player, they die.

roles.name: Godfather
roles.description: You start knowing which Outsiders are in play. If 1 died today, choose a player tonight: they die. [-1 or +1 Outsider]

roles.name: Devil's Advocate
roles.description: Each night, choose a living player (different to last night): if executed tomorrow, they don't die.

roles.name: Assassin
roles.description: Once per game, at night*, choose a player: they die, even if for some reason they could not.

roles.name: Mastermind
roles.description: If the Demon dies by execution (ending the game), player for 1 more day. If a player is then executed, their team loses.

roles.name: Zombuul
roles.description: Each night*, if no-one died today, choose a player: they die. The 1st time you die, you live but register as dead.

roles.name: Pukka
roles.description: Each night, choose a player: they are poisoned. The previously poisoned player dies then becomes healthy.

roles.name: Shabaloth
roles.description: Each night*, choose 2 players: they die. A dead player you chose last night might be regurgitated.

roles.name: Po
roles.description: Each night*, you may choose a player: they die. If your last choice was no-one, choose 3 players tonight.
